description: Approved Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Each entry pins the binary/source by name and lists the tools the MCP is allowed to expose. Tools not on the approved list MUST be ignored at registration time.

entries.purpose: read/list filesystem within a sandboxed root
entries.notes: default to read-only; PR required to grant write tools
host allowlist is enforced at the MCP itself
user-level skill 'gstack/browse' replaces this MCP per project guidance

rules.block_message: yieldOS bloqueó la instalación del MCP: no está en el policy oficial. Para agregarlo, abrí un PR a /policy/mcps.json con la lista de tools que va a exponer.
rules.validate_tool_surface_note: before yieldOS allows MCP registration, the MCP's announced tools must match the approved_tools list 1:1; extras = block
